Place SVP

Revit Utilities Live 0:47

Drop a soil & vent pipe through every floor in three clicks.

What it does

Place SVP is part of the Revit Utilities set in BUILD MEP. Drop a soil & vent pipe through every floor in three clicks. The video above shows the workflow end-to-end against a sample model.

How it works

  1. Open the chat panel and ask "place svp"
  2. BUILD MEP previews what it's about to do, then runs it against the active model
  3. Review the result inline; commit, undo, or refine with a follow-up prompt
